title: Full Stack Developer - Utrip
description: • Building scalable and reusable JavaScript/TypeScript components with React.js, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS in a multitenant architecture. • Developing RESTful APIs with Nest.js following DDD and TDD principles, with a focus on clean, testable, and well-documented code. • Managing relational (MySQL) and non-relational (MongoDB) databases, with performance optimization using Redis cache. • Supporting AWS operations (Lambda, Amplify, EKS) and automating deployment pipelines. • Participating in code reviews, contributing to best practices, and communicating delivery quality to stakeholders.

title: Full Stack JavaScript Developer - TAG
description: • Creating web applications and AI agents to automate internal processes using Python, LangChain, React.js, Node.js, Tailwind CSS, and REST APIs. • Integrating solutions with corporate systems, centralizing information and improving operational efficiency. • Collaborating cross-functionally with technical and non-technical stakeholders to define features and deliver improvements.

title: Full Stack Developer - Wilson Sons
description: • Developing full stack solutions with C, C++, Java, and Python, building RESTful APIs and backend applications with Node.js and Java. • Applying clean architecture and DDD concepts; collaborating on multi-service integrations with Git versioning and Docker deployments. • Working in an agile environment, troubleshooting and solving technical issues across the entire application stack.
